homepage.heroSubline: From Broad Ripple to Carmel, we tackle the toughest leaks, clogs, and plumbing nightmares. Trust Plumb Doctor for fast, reliable service.
aboutText: Plumb Doctor started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our neighbors in Indianapolis. We're not just fixing pipes, we're building relationships based on trust and quality workmanship.

We approach every job, big or small, with the same dedication to excellence. Our team uses proven techniques and quality materials to ensure lasting solutions. We explain the problem clearly and offer transparent pricing, so you're always in the know.

We're proud to serve the Indianapolis community. We support local schools and charities, and we're committed to providing fair and ethical service to every homeowner. We're your neighbors, and we treat you like family.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Plumbing emergencies don't wait for business hours. We're available around the clock to handle your urgent plumbing needs.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins, so you know exactly what to expect.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team of licensed and insured plumbers has the expertise to handle any plumbing challenge, from simple repairs to complex installations.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not completely satisfied with our service, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call Plumb Doctor for fast, reliable service in Indianapolis and surrounding areas.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Fast and effective drain cleaning to keep your plumbing flowing smoothly.
services.description:
Clogged drains are a common nuisance in Indianapolis homes, especially with older plumbing found in areas like Broad Ripple and Meridian-Kessler. From slow-draining sinks to completely blocked pipes, Plumb Doctor's drain cleaning service gets your water flowing again. We use a variety of methods, including snaking, hydro jetting, and enzymatic cleaners, to clear even the toughest obstructions. We tackle everything from hair and grease buildup to tree root intrusion. 

Our experienced technicians will diagnose the cause of your drain blockage and recommend the most effective solution. We'll also provide tips on how to prevent future clogs, such as avoiding pouring grease down the drain and using drain screens. Considering the age of many Indianapolis homes, regular drain maintenance is crucial to prevent costly plumbing repairs down the road. 

Don't let a clogged drain disrupt your day. Call Plumb Doctor for fast, reliable drain cleaning services. We'll have your drains flowing freely in no time, whether it's a simple sink clog or a more complex sewer line blockage.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the cause of the clog using camera inspection if needed.
Step 2: Select the appropriate drain cleaning method (snaking, hydro jetting, etc.).
Step 3: Clear the clog and restore proper drainage.
Step 4: Provide tips on preventing future clogs.
benefits: Extends the life of your plumbing system

faq.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend professional drain cleaning every 1-2 years to prevent buildup and blockages. Homes with older plumbing may benefit from more frequent cleaning.

faq.question: What are the signs of a clogged drain?
faq.answer: Signs of a clogged drain include slow-draining sinks, gurgling sounds, and unpleasant odors. If you notice any of these signs, call Plumb Doctor for prompt service.

faq.question: Is hydro jetting safe for my pipes?
faq.answer: Yes, hydro jetting is a safe and effective method for clearing stubborn clogs. Our technicians are trained to use hydro jetting equipment safely and effectively without damaging your pipes.

services.name: Water Heater Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert water heater services to keep your hot water flowing.
services.description:
A malfunctioning water heater can be a major inconvenience, especially during Indianapolis's cold winters. Plumb Doctor provides comprehensive water heater repair and installation services for all types of water heaters, including gas, electric, and tankless models. We understand the importance of having reliable hot water for showers, laundry, and dishwashing.

Our experienced technicians can diagnose and repair a wide range of water heater problems, from leaks and strange noises to inconsistent water temperature and no hot water at all. We use quality replacement parts to ensure lasting repairs. If your water heater is beyond repair, we can recommend and install a new, energy-efficient model that meets your needs and budget. We work with all major brands and offer expert advice on choosing the right water heater for your home.

Whether you need a quick repair or a complete water heater replacement, Plumb Doctor is here to help. We offer fast, reliable service and upfront pricing. Don't suffer through another cold shower – call us today!
process: Step 1: Inspect the water heater to diagnose the problem.
Step 2: Provide a detailed estimate for repair or replacement.
Step 3: Perform the necessary repairs or install a new water heater.
Step 4: Test the water heater to ensure proper operation.

faq.question: How long does a water heater typically last?
faq.answer: The average lifespan of a water heater is 8-12 years. Regular maintenance can help extend its lifespan.

faq.question: What are the signs that my water heater needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your water heater needs to be replaced include leaks, rust, strange noises, and inconsistent water temperature.

faq.question: What is a tankless water heater?
faq.answer: A tankless water heater heats water on demand, providing endless hot water and saving energy. They are a great option for homes with high hot water usage.

services.name: Leak Detection
services.shortDescription: Pinpointing hidden leaks to prevent water damage and save you money.
services.description:
Hidden leaks can cause significant damage to your Indianapolis home, leading to mold growth, structural problems, and high water bills. Plumb Doctor's leak detection service uses advanced technology to pinpoint the source of hidden leaks quickly and accurately. We use non-invasive methods to minimize disruption to your home.

Our experienced technicians are trained to identify leaks in walls, floors, and underground pipes. We use acoustic listening devices, infrared cameras, and other specialized equipment to locate leaks without tearing into your walls or floors. Once we've located the leak, we can provide expert repair services to stop the leak and prevent further damage.

Don't let a hidden leak drain your wallet and damage your home. Call Plumb Doctor for professional leak detection services. We'll find the leak and provide a cost-effective solution to protect your property.
process: Step 1: Conduct a thorough inspection of your plumbing system.
Step 2: Use advanced leak detection technology to locate hidden leaks.
Step 3: Provide a detailed report of our findings.
Step 4: Offer expert repair services to stop the leak.
benefits: Protects your home from mold growth

faq.question: What are the signs of a hidden leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, damp spots on walls or floors, and the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use.

faq.question: How much does leak detection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of leak detection varies depending on the size and complexity of the job. We provide upfront pricing before any work begins.

faq.question: Can you repair the leak after you find it?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive leak repair services to stop the leak and prevent further damage.

services.name: Sewer Line Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert sewer line services to keep your home's waste flowing properly.
services.description:
Sewer line problems can be messy, expensive, and disruptive. Plumb Doctor provides expert sewer line repair and replacement services to homeowners in Indianapolis and surrounding areas. We understand the importance of having a properly functioning sewer line to protect your home and health.

Our experienced technicians use advanced techniques to diagnose and repair sewer line problems, including pipe bursting, trenchless repair, and traditional excavation. We can handle everything from minor repairs to complete sewer line replacements. We also offer sewer line cleaning and inspection services to prevent future problems.

We understand that sewer line problems can be stressful. That's why we offer fast, reliable service and transparent pricing. We'll explain the problem clearly and provide you with the best solution for your needs and budget. We always obtain the required permits for sewer line work in Indianapolis, ensuring code compliance.

Don't let a sewer line problem ruin your day. Call Plumb Doctor for expert sewer line services.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the sewer line problem using camera inspection.
Step 2: Recommend the best repair or replacement method.
Step 3: Obtain the necessary permits.
Step 4: Perform the sewer line repair or replacement.

faq.question: What are the signs of a sewer line problem?
faq.answer: Signs of a sewer line problem include sewage backups, slow-draining toilets, gurgling sounds, and unpleasant odors.

faq.question: What is trenchless sewer line repair?
faq.answer: Trenchless sewer line repair is a method of repairing or replacing sewer lines without digging a large trench. It is less disruptive and more cost-effective than traditional excavation.

faq.question: How much does sewer line repair or replacement cost?
faq.answer: The cost of sewer line repair or replacement varies depending on the extent of the damage and the method used. We provide upfront pricing before any work begins.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of faucets, sinks, toilets, and more.
services.description:
Upgrading your fixtures can enhance the look and functionality of your Indianapolis home. Plumb Doctor provides professional fixture installation services for faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, and more. We ensure that your new fixtures are installed correctly and efficiently.

Our experienced technicians can handle all types of fixture installations, from simple faucet replacements to complete bathroom renovations. We work with all major brands and offer expert advice on choosing the right fixtures for your needs and budget. We also ensure that all installations meet local plumbing codes.

Whether you're renovating your kitchen or bathroom or simply replacing a leaky faucet, Plumb Doctor is here to help. We offer fast, reliable service and competitive pricing. We'll make sure your new fixtures are installed properly and look great.
process: Step 1: Remove the old fixture.
Step 2: Prepare the area for the new fixture.
Step 3: Install the new fixture according to manufacturer's instructions.
Step 4: Test the fixture to ensure proper operation.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a new toilet?
faq.answer: The installation of a new toilet typically takes 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your fixture installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our workmanship.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right fixtures for my home?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide expert advice on choosing the right fixtures for your needs and budget.

services.name: Sump Pump Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your basement dry with our sump pump repair, installation, and maintenance services.
services.description:
Indianapolis homes, particularly those in areas prone to flooding or with older foundations, rely on sump pumps to prevent basement flooding. Plumb Doctor offers comprehensive sump pump services including installation, repair, and maintenance. We know a functioning sump pump is crucial, especially during heavy rains and snow melts.

Our team can assess your basement's needs and recommend the right sump pump for your home. We install all types of sump pumps including submersible and pedestal models, along with battery backup systems for uninterrupted protection during power outages. If your existing sump pump is malfunctioning, we offer prompt repair services to get it back up and running quickly.

Regular maintenance is key to a reliable sump pump. We provide maintenance services to ensure your sump pump is operating efficiently and effectively, preventing costly water damage in your basement. Don't wait for the next downpour – call Plumb Doctor for reliable sump pump services and peace of mind.
process: Step 1: Evaluate your basement's specific needs and potential for flooding.
Step 2: Recommend the appropriate sump pump system and backup options.
Step 3: Install the sump pump according to manufacturer's guidelines and local codes.
Step 4: Provide ongoing maintenance and repair services to ensure optimal performance.
benefits: Protects your belongings from water damage
Reduces the risk of mold growth
Provides peace of mind during heavy rains

faq.question: How often should I replace my sump pump?
faq.answer: Sump pumps typically last 7-10 years. We recommend replacing your sump pump before it fails to avoid potential water damage.

faq.question: What is a battery backup sump pump?
faq.answer: A battery backup sump pump provides power to your sump pump during a power outage, ensuring continuous protection against flooding.

faq.question: How do I know if my sump pump is failing?
faq.answer: Signs of a failing sump pump include unusual noises, infrequent cycling, and standing water in the sump pit.

serviceAreas.content:
Plumb Doctor is proud to offer our full range of plumbing services to the residents and businesses of Carmel, Indiana. Known for its upscale neighborhoods developed primarily from the 1980s through the 2000s, Carmel presents unique plumbing needs, from maintaining complex irrigation systems to ensuring the efficient operation of modern appliances. We understand the importance of quality and reliability in this community, and our experienced technicians are equipped to handle any plumbing issue, big or small. 

With Carmel's cold winters, frozen pipes are a common concern. Plumb Doctor provides expert pipe insulation and winterization services to help prevent costly damage and keep your home comfortable. We also offer routine maintenance checks to identify and address potential problems before they escalate, giving you peace of mind throughout the year.
serviceAreas.localContext: Carmel is known for its upscale residential developments dating from the 1980s-2000s and experiences cold, snowy winters.

serviceAreas.content:

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Our old water heater finally gave out. Plumb Doctor came out the same day and gave us a fair price on a new one. The installation was quick and professional, and they even hauled away the old unit. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Had a stubborn clog in our kitchen sink. Plumb Doctor was able to clear it quickly using some kind of special tool. The plumber was friendly and explained everything he was doing. Would use them again.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: We had a major sewer line issue and were dreading the cost and the mess. Plumb Doctor was able to repair it with minimal digging using a trenchless method. They saved us a ton of money and hassle. Very professional and efficient.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: We suspected a leak in our basement but couldn't find it. Plumb Doctor used some fancy equipment to pinpoint the source of the leak behind a wall. They were able to fix it quickly and prevent further damage. Great service!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Plumb Doctor installed a new faucet in our bathroom. The plumber was on time, courteous, and did a great job. The new faucet looks beautiful! The only reason for 4 stars is the price was a little higher than I expected, but the quality of the work was worth it.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: Our sump pump failed during a heavy rainstorm. Plumb Doctor came out immediately and replaced it with a new, more powerful model. They saved our basement from flooding! Highly recommend their emergency service.
